content.en:
"No matter what Emperor Fengyang does, even if it is wrong, it can only be dealt with by our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and you human race are not qualified to deal with the people of our Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Beacon Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"We're just disposing of it, what can you do?"

Ye Tian was not intimidated at all, and said.

"Then I will take you into the Heavenly Emperor's Palace and hand it over to the emperors!"

The Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor directly made a move, capturing Ye Tian with the strength of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Although Ye Tian had killed the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, that was when the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was suppressed by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and his strength could not be exerted much.

But now it's different, the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor can completely mobilize all his strength.

Rumble!!!

An ancient phoenix rushed towards Ye Tian with endless flames, this is the famous Great Thousand Dao Technique of the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor - the Great Ancient Phoenix Technique, which was created by imitating an ancient chaos phoenix at the level of the strongest Dao Ancestor, and the power is very terrifying, and it can burn all the rules.

"Nine Turns Immortal Golden Body!"

"Ancient Desolation!"

Ye Tianyi performed two Great Thousand Dao Techniques in a row, coupled with the forbidden body of the Dacheng Realm, he stubbornly resisted the Great Ancient Phoenix Technique of the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor.

Boom!!!

Ye Tian's body kept retreating, the Nine Turns Immortal Golden Body was dim, and the Ancient Desolate Body was also broken, but the forbidden body of the Dacheng Realm weakened a lot of attacks, so Ye Tian was only slightly injured and forcibly caught this move.

"Dacheng's Forbidden Body !!"

Beacon Dao Ancestor's expression changed.

This is a goal that many invincible Dao Ancestors have not achieved, but I didn't expect Ye Tian to achieve it!

Moreover, Ye Tian's Nine Transformations Immortal Golden Body and Ancient Desolate Body, the two Great Thousand Dao Techniques, had actually reached the Xiaocheng realm, and this cultivation speed was too fast, right?

How long has it been since the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor became a Dao Ancestor? In such a short period of time, even if he has a defensive Dao-level natal talent, coupled with the use of forbidden treasures that improve his comprehension all the time, he will not be able to cultivate the two Great Thousand Dao Techniques to the realm of Xiaocheng!

It's a game-breaker!

In fact, Ye Tian was promoted to Dao Ancestor with the Supreme True Ancestor, and his comprehension itself was terrifying, plus Ye Tian had copied so many Dao-level natal talents, many of which involved defense, so the speed at which he comprehended the Great Thousand Dao Techniques was not comparable to other Supreme True Ancestors.

Of course, it was naturally impossible to tell the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor all this.

Then.

The Beacon Dao Ancestor took out a forbidden weapon that contained the forbidden rules of fire - the Beacon Knife!

It can be seen from the battle just now that Ye Tian's strength has reached the realm of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is also the top Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, coupled with the forbidden body of the Dacheng level, it is difficult for an ordinary Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor to kill Ye Tian.

Although he is a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he is not the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, if he doesn't use a forbidden weapon, I'm afraid he won't be able to capture Ye Tian.

Shout!

The Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor killed him closely.

And Ye Tian didn't hide his forbidden weapon anymore, and directly took out the forbidden weapon, the Sky Killing Spear.

Thundered!!!!

The two fought, not long after the competition, the Beacon Dao Ancestor actually found that his Beacon Flame Knife was faintly cracking, if it wasn't for his strength to protect the Beacon Knife, I am afraid that Ye Tian could break his Beacon Knife with a spear.

"Your spear is a moderately forbidden weapon!"

The Beacon Dao Ancestor finally recognized it, and he was immediately shocked.

The Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors like him in the Heavenly Emperor Palace do not all have forbidden weapons, only a few have forbidden weapons, and some Supreme Dao Ancestors do not have medium forbidden weapons, only the invincible Dao Ancestors have the foundation to create a forbidden weapon, but it will also cost a lot of treasures, and they are even reluctant to build it.

But Ye Tiancai had just broken through the Dao Ancestor, and he actually had the financial resources to create a medium forbidden weapon!

Moreover, Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen also has a forbidden weapon!

He really wants to scold, is the Terran so rich?

During the battle, Ye Tian was full of firepower, and even the forbidden realm was used, and the Ten Directions Void Determination Technique of the Bondage Great Thousand Dao Technique was also used, but the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor was too powerful to restrain the other party at all, so he could only affect him slightly.

"Ancient Slashing Technique!"

Ye Tian slashed the void with the Heaven Slaying Spear and performed this Great Thousand Dao Technique, which was a technique he had recently figured out, which could initially fuse the forbidden weapon with the Great Thousand Dao Technique and increase its power slightly.

Shout!

A golden ray of light slashed out and slashed towards the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor.

However, the Ancient Slash Technique could only leave a mark on the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor's Great Thousand Dao Technique Flame Ember True Armor, and it didn't hurt the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestor at all.

Throughout the whole process, Ye Tian was suppressed, if he hadn't relied on the Dacheng-level forbidden body to save his life, he would have been defeated a long time ago.

"The strength is still a lot worse!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But he can't help it, and his strength can't be improved to a higher level in one step, so he still needs to cultivate slowly.

In such a short period of time, he was able to fight with the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor without being defeated, which was already terrifying!

Abrupt.

A voice came.

"Beacon, stand down!"

Hearing this voice, the Beacon Dao Ancestor did not fight with Ye Tian, but retreated.

Then, a middle-aged man with bare feet appeared

He was dressed in Taoist robes, with a blue-gold crown trimmed with gold trim on his head, and behind his hands, there was a mysterious smile, but more of a chill.

"I've seen Lord Blue Sky!"

Beacon Dao Ancestor bent down and saluted.

"Heavenly Emperor Palace, Blue Sky Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This is not a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but an Eightfold Heavenly Supreme Dao Ancestor, comparable to the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, if you are willing to join our Heavenly Emperor Palace, this matter can be settled, otherwise I won't take you back to deal with it today, and I will directly kill you on the spot!" Blue Sky Dao Ancestor threatened in a cold voice.

"I'm sorry, I won't join the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

All around, many onlookers felt that Ye Tian was in trouble, and they were afraid that he would fall, and they regretted it one by one.

Some Dao Ancestors even think that it is good to join the Heavenly Emperor Palace, at least a big backer!

"Then you will die!"

Blue Sky Dao Ancestor made a move, and a blue light instantly pierced through, without the slightest mercilessness.

No Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor could block this blow, let alone Ye Tian, who only had the strength of a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian also knew that he couldn't stop it, but he didn't panic at all.

Abrupt.

A figure blocked in front of Ye Tian, easily blocking the blow.

This man was dressed in a black robe and wore a mask, and the forbidden word was engraved on the robe - wind!

He is the Wind King of Black Wind Mountain.

The Wind King seemed to know the Blue Sky Dao Ancestor, and said with a smile: "Blue Sky Dao Ancestor, I haven't seen you for a long time, why do you want to kill our Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain as soon as you appear?"

Blue Sky Dao Ancestor was puzzled: "Black Wind Mountain Heavenly King, didn't the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor say that it is not your Black Wind Mountain's Nine Extremes Heavenly King, why is it again?"

The Wind King sneered: "Even if the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor is not the Nine Extremes Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain, it doesn't mean that he can't become the Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain, right? Do you want to fight me?

Blue Sky Dao Ancestor's expression froze, and he made a move with the Wind King, he was not an opponent!
